zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Erskine 13th Earl of Mar於1346年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾厄斯金時，他的父親Robert Erskine36歲，母親Lady Beatrice de Lindsay61歲。他和Janet Keith of Syntoun至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1403年4月在英國格盧斯特斯爾希爾享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Erskine 13th Earl of Mar于1346年出生在苏格兰雷福福爾厄斯金时，他的父亲Robert Erskine36岁，母亲Lady Beatrice de Lindsay61岁。他和Janet Keith of Syntoun至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1403年4月在英国格盧斯特斯爾希爾享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Erskine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Erskine in Renfrewshire, first recorded in 1226 in the form Erskyn.
History: A family of this name have held a number of Scottish titles, including the earldoms of Mar, Buchan, Kellie, and Rosslyn.

variants.name: Erskin
meanings: Scottish (central Scotland and Fife): variant of   Erskine  . This form of the surname is now more common in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Erskine 13th Earl of Mar was born in 1346, in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, his father, Robert Erskine, was 36 and his mother, Lady Beatrice de Lindsay, was 61. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Janet Keith of Syntoun. He died in April 1403, in Hill, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Erskine 13th Earl of Mar est né en 1346, à Erskine, Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Robert Erskine, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Lady Beatrice de Lindsay, avait 61 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Janet Keith of Syntoun. Il est décédé en avril 1403, à Hill, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Erskine 13th Earl of Mar 1346 in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Erskine 36 und seine Mutter Lady Beatrice de Lindsay 61. Er hatte mit Janet Keith of Syntoun mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb im April 1403 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Hill, Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Erskine 13th Earl of Mar è nato il nel 1346 nel Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Robert Erskine, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Lady Beatrice de Lindsay, aveva 61 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Janet Keith of Syntoun. Morì nel aprile 1403, nel Hill, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Erskine 13th Earl of Marが1346年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエルスキンで生まれた時，父Robert Erskineは36歳，母Lady Beatrice de Lindsayは61歳であった。彼はJanet Keith of Syntounとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1403年4月にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアヒルで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Erskine 13th Earl of Mar(이)가 1346년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 어스킨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Erskine(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Beatrice de Lindsay(은)는 61세였다. 그는 Janet Keith of Syntoun(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1403년 4월 영국 그루스스터실르 힐에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Erskine 13th Earl of Mar nasceu em 1346, em Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Robert Erskine, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Lady Beatrice de Lindsay, tinha 61 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Janet Keith of Syntoun. Ele faleceu em abril de 1403, em Hill, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Erskine 13th Earl of Mar родился в 1346 г. в местности эрскаин, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Robert Erskine было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Beatrice de Lindsay, 61. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Janet Keith of Syntoun. Он умер апрель 1403 г. в местности хилл, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Erskine 13th Earl of Mar nació en 1346, en Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, su papá, Robert Erskine, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Lady Beatrice de Lindsay, tenía 61 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Janet Keith of Syntoun. Murió en abril de 1403, en Hill, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años.
